text:
There once was a lonely old fox named Felix. His home smelled like old leaves. His favorite place to sit was by the firepit. Sometimes he would sing a silly song he made up about an elephant who liked bananas.

Once Felix got a little lonely, so he decided to go on an adventure. He ventured into the forest near his house, intending to find a nice quiet place to nap under a big oak tree.

Felix ventured further than he ever had before. He explored a giant oak tree hollow. He discovered a small pond full of shiny pebbles.

He noticed a bright moon outshining a star. Felix decided to chase that star. When he stumbled across a patch of flowers with giant petrichor smells, he stopped right in front of one.

The moment was perfect. Felix basked in the moonlight under the flowers, savoring the sweet scent.

He barked happily and took a big drink of water.

Felix continued exploring far past the patch
